All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

A

addEdge(Node) - Method in class graph.Node
Adds an outgoing directed edge to another node, ensuring duplicates are avoided.
addPublisher(Agent) - Method in class graph.Topic
Registers an agent as an authorized publisher for this topic.
addServlet(String, String, Servlet) - Method in interface server.HTTPServer
Associates a specific servlet controller instance with an HTTP command and URI route.
addServlet(String, String, Servlet) - Method in class server.MyHTTPServer
Registers a servlet to handle requests matching the specified HTTP command and URI route prefix.
Agent - Interface in graph
Defines the operational contract for reactive processing nodes (agents) within the message-routing network.
asDouble - Variable in class graph.Message
The numeric representation of the payload.
asText - Variable in class graph.Message
The text representation of the payload.

B

BinOpAgent - Class in graph
An event-driven agent that applies a binary mathematical operator to inputs from two subscription topics and publishes the computed results to an output topic.
BinOpAgent(String, String, String, String, BinaryOperator<Double>) - Constructor for class graph.BinOpAgent
Constructs a BinOpAgent and registers it with the designated input and output topics.

C

callback(String, Message) - Method in interface graph.Agent
Reactively processes incoming messages dispatched from subscription topics.
callback(String, Message) - Method in class graph.BinOpAgent
Receives messages from input topics, stores them in val1 and val2, and publishes the result when both values are available.
callback(String, Message) - Method in class graph.ParallelAgent
Places the incoming message task onto the active message queue to be processed asynchronously by the background consumer thread.
callback(String, Message) - Method in class graph.TextMergeAgent
Receives message updates, caches them as strings, and publishes the concatenated result when both inputs are available.
clear() - Method in class graph.TopicManagerSingleton.TopicManager
Clears all mapped topics, ensuring subscribers and publishers are cleanly detached to avoid memory leaks (Cascading Clean).
close() - Method in interface configs.Config
Terminates all background execution context pipelines associated with this configuration.
close() - Method in class configs.GenericConfig
Safely terminates all active parallel agents and closes background threads.
close() - Method in class configs.MathExampleConfig
Safely closes and unregisters all active agents created by this configuration, preventing resource leaks and dangling references.
close() - Method in interface graph.Agent
Cleans up all topic subscriptions and unregisters publisher entries from the global directory before disposal, preventing dangling references and memory leaks.
close() - Method in class graph.BinOpAgent
Cleans up topic registrations by unsubscribing from inputs and removing publisher status.
close() - Method in class graph.ParallelAgent
Cleans up processing execution context threads and closes the decorated agent.
close() - Method in interface server.HTTPServer
Gracefully terminates the HTTP server, closing open sockets, halting session thread pools, and releasing system port bindings.
close() - Method in class server.MyHTTPServer
Shuts down the HTTP server.
close() - Method in class servlets.ConfLoader
Performs graceful servlet teardown, closing running background executions.
close() - Method in class servlets.HtmlLoader
Closes the servlet resources.
close() - Method in interface servlets.Servlet
Disposes of any persistent resources, file handles, or active caches managed by the servlet during system teardown.
close() - Method in class servlets.TopicDisplayer
Standard clean sequence, removing all custom tracker agents from topic registries.
Config - Interface in configs
Defines the contract for structural configuration controllers that build and manage messaging and agent processing topologies.
configs - package configs
Contains configuration loaders and setup specifications used to initialize dynamic processing graphs.
ConfLoader - Class in servlets
An HTTP controller servlet responsible for managing the lifecycle of pipeline configurations.
ConfLoader() - Constructor for class servlets.ConfLoader
 
create() - Method in interface configs.Config
Initializes, validates, and deploys the processing topology.
create() - Method in class configs.GenericConfig
Reads the configuration file, parses the agent specifications, validates the graph for cycles, and dynamically instantiates them.
create() - Method in class configs.MathExampleConfig
Dynamically instantiates the addition, subtraction, and multiplication agents, registers them with the global TopicManager directory, and retains references for graceful disposal.
createFromTopics() - Method in class graph.Graph
Rebuilds the graph layout based on topics and agents currently in TopicManager.

D

data - Variable in class graph.Message
The raw binary payload byte array of this message.
date - Variable in class graph.Message
The creation timestamp recording when the message was instantiated.

G

GenericConfig - Class in configs
A configuration manager that parses network layout files, validates the resulting logical topology for cyclic paths, and instantiates parallel agents.
GenericConfig() - Constructor for class configs.GenericConfig
Constructs a GenericConfig instance to handle dynamic agent topology creation.
get() - Static method in class graph.TopicManagerSingleton
Static method to get the single instance of the TopicManager.
getContent() - Method in class server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
Retrieves the raw bytes representing the request body content.
getEdges() - Method in class graph.Node
Retrieves the list of outgoing directed edges from this node.
getGraphHTML(Graph) - Static method in class views.HtmlGraphWriter
Transforms a logical Graph instance into visual HTML layout content.
getHttpCommand() - Method in class server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
Retrieves the HTTP request verb.
getMsg() - Method in class graph.Node
Retrieves the message payload associated with this node.
getName() - Method in interface configs.Config
Retrieves the unique, human-readable name of the configuration.
getName() - Method in class configs.GenericConfig
Retrieves the descriptive, human-readable name of this configuration.
getName() - Method in class configs.MathExampleConfig
Retrieves the unique, human-readable name of the configuration.
getName() - Method in interface graph.Agent
Retrieves the unique, descriptive name of this agent instance.
getName() - Method in class graph.BinOpAgent
Retrieves the unique descriptive name of this agent instance.
getName() - Method in class graph.Node
Retrieves the name of the node.
getName() - Method in class graph.ParallelAgent
Retrieves the descriptive, unique name of the decorated agent.
getParameters() - Method in class server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
Retrieves the decoded map of request parameters.
getPubs() - Method in class graph.Topic
Exposes the thread-safe publisher list to the graph generation utilities.
getSubs() - Method in class graph.Topic
Exposes the thread-safe subscriber list to the graph generation utilities.
getTopic(String) - Method in class graph.TopicManagerSingleton.TopicManager
Retrieves an existing Topic or creates a new one if it doesn't exist (Flyweight).
getTopics() - Method in class graph.TopicManagerSingleton.TopicManager
Returns a Collection of all currently managed Topics.
getUri() - Method in class server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
Retrieves the full request URI.
getUriSegments() - Method in class server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
Retrieves the split path segments of the requested target URI.
getVersion() - Method in interface configs.Config
Retrieves the operational release version number of this configuration.
getVersion() - Method in class configs.GenericConfig
Retrieves the structural release version number of this configuration.
getVersion() - Method in class configs.MathExampleConfig
Retrieves the structural release version number of this configuration.
graph - package graph
Contains the core messaging directory, thread-safe topics, concurrent active object wrappers, mathematical calculation agents, and topological graph-verification structures.
Graph - Class in graph
Represents a directed graph of communication topics and processing agents, extending ArrayList of Node.
Graph() - Constructor for class graph.Graph
 

H

handle(RequestParser.RequestInfo, OutputStream) - Method in class servlets.ConfLoader
Handles loading new layouts or unloading the current running topology cleanly.
handle(RequestParser.RequestInfo, OutputStream) - Method in class servlets.HtmlLoader
Resolves requests targeting the "/app/" route to load and stream files.
handle(RequestParser.RequestInfo, OutputStream) - Method in interface servlets.Servlet
Resolves an incoming client HTTP request and streams the corresponding response data.
handle(RequestParser.RequestInfo, OutputStream) - Method in class servlets.TopicDisplayer
Handles routing requests to serve the zero-flicker HTML dashboard, returns JSON values, publishes messages to target topics, or triggers cascading state resets.
hasCycles() - Method in class graph.Graph
Determines whether the graph contains any cycles within its connected components.
hasCycles() - Method in class graph.Node
Determines whether there is a directed cycle reachable from this node.
HtmlGraphWriter - Class in views
A dynamic view-rendering utility that compiles a logical graph topology into an interactive HTML visualization.
HtmlGraphWriter() - Constructor for class views.HtmlGraphWriter
 
HtmlLoader - Class in servlets
An HTTP controller servlet responsible for retrieving and streaming static resource files (such as HTML, JavaScript, etc.) from a local filesystem workspace.
HtmlLoader(String) - Constructor for class servlets.HtmlLoader
Constructs an HtmlLoader pointing to a local filesystem workspace.
HTTPServer - Interface in server
Defines the operational contract for a lightweight, concurrent HTTP server.

I

IncAgent - Class in graph
An event-driven agent that increments values received on its input topic by 1 and publishes the result to an output topic.
IncAgent(String[], String[]) - Constructor for class graph.IncAgent
Constructs an IncAgent and registers it with the designated input and output topics.

L

lastTopicValues - Static variable in class servlets.TopicDisplayer
Shared thread-safe map storing the last known string values for each topic.

M

MathExampleConfig - Class in configs
A hardcoded computational math layout configuration that sets up a multi-stage calculation pipeline.
MathExampleConfig() - Constructor for class configs.MathExampleConfig
Constructs a MathExampleConfig instance with an empty registry of managed agents.
Message - Class in graph
An immutable container that encapsulates message payloads and automatically handles common data type conversions.
Message(byte[]) - Constructor for class graph.Message
Main constructor taking a byte array.
Message(double) - Constructor for class graph.Message
Constructor taking a double, reusing the main constructor.
Message(String) - Constructor for class graph.Message
Constructor taking a String, reusing the main constructor.
MulAgent - Class in graph
An event-driven agent that performs binary multiplication on two input topics and publishes the result to an output topic.
MulAgent(String[], String[]) - Constructor for class graph.MulAgent
Constructs a MulAgent and registers it with the designated input and output topics by delegating the registration and multiplication strategy to the BinOpAgent base class.
MyHTTPServer - Class in server
A multi-threaded HTTP server implementation of HTTPServer that extends Thread.
MyHTTPServer(int, int) - Constructor for class server.MyHTTPServer
Initializes the server with a port and thread capacity.

N

name - Variable in class graph.Topic
The unique descriptive name of the topic.
Node - Class in graph
Represents a vertex within a directed network graph.
Node(String) - Constructor for class graph.Node
Constructs a Node with the given name.

P

ParallelAgent - Class in graph
A thread-safe wrapper that introduces asynchronous execution to any Agent.
ParallelAgent(Agent, int) - Constructor for class graph.ParallelAgent
Constructs a ParallelAgent wrapping an existing Agent.
parseRequest(BufferedReader) - Static method in class server.RequestParser
Parses the incoming HTTP request stream and maps its components into a structured RequestInfo object.
PlusAgent - Class in graph
An event-driven agent that performs binary addition on two input topics and publishes the result to an output topic.
PlusAgent(String[], String[]) - Constructor for class graph.PlusAgent
Constructs a PlusAgent and registers it with the designated input and output topics.
publish(Message) - Method in class graph.Topic
Publishes an immutable message, dispatching its contents to the callbacks of all registered subscriber agents.

R

removePublisher(Agent) - Method in class graph.Topic
Unregisters an agent from the publisher list.
removeServlet(String, String) - Method in interface server.HTTPServer
Disassociates and removes the servlet mapped to the specified HTTP command and URI route.
removeServlet(String, String) - Method in class server.MyHTTPServer
Unregisters the servlet bound to the specified HTTP command and URI route prefix.
RequestInfo(String, String, String[], Map<String, String>, byte[]) - Constructor for class server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
Constructs a RequestInfo containing the parsed elements of the client HTTP request.
RequestParser - Class in server
Utility parser engine designed to decode incoming HTTP request protocol streams into structured, type-safe RequestParser.RequestInfo data objects.
RequestParser() - Constructor for class server.RequestParser
 
RequestParser.RequestInfo - Class in server
An immutable data container that encapsulates decoded HTTP request properties.
reset() - Method in interface graph.Agent
Restores the agent's internal cache values and state variables back to their default structural starting values.
reset() - Method in class graph.BinOpAgent
Resets the input values val1 and val2 back to default values (0.0).
reset() - Method in class graph.ParallelAgent
Resets the internal state and cache values of the decorated agent.
reset() - Method in class graph.TextMergeAgent
Resets the internal text caches back to null.
run() - Method in class server.MyHTTPServer
Main execution logic running in a background thread.

S

server - package server
Contains the concurrent, multi-threaded HTTP server implementation, request parsing utilities, and connection worker pool components.
Servlet - Interface in servlets
Defines the contract for HTTP request processors (controllers) in the server's MVC architecture.
servlets - package servlets
Contains MVC servlet controllers used to handle HTTP requests, dynamic configuration uploading, asset delivery, and dashboard status displays.
setConfFile(String) - Method in class configs.GenericConfig
Sets the path of the target configuration file.
setEdges(List<Node>) - Method in class graph.Node
Sets the list of outgoing directed edges from this node.
setMsg(Message) - Method in class graph.Node
Associates a message payload with this node.
setName(String) - Method in class graph.Node
Sets the name of the node.
start() - Method in interface server.HTTPServer
Spawns the primary socket listener thread to start accepting incoming TCP client connections.
subscribe(Agent) - Method in class graph.Topic
Registers an agent as a subscriber to receive message updates.

T

TextMergeAgent - Class in graph
An event-driven agent that performs non-mathematical string concatenation on both text and numeric payloads received from two input topics.
TextMergeAgent(String[], String[]) - Constructor for class graph.TextMergeAgent
Constructs a TextMergeAgent and registers it with the designated input and output topics.
Topic - Class in graph
Represents a named communication channel (subject) implementing the Observer design pattern.
TopicDisplayer - Class in servlets
An HTTP controller servlet responsible for displaying, updating, and resetting the real-time value table of all registered system topics.
TopicDisplayer() - Constructor for class servlets.TopicDisplayer
 
TopicManagerSingleton - Class in graph
Access coordinator that exposes a thread-safe, globally accessible single instance of the system's TopicManagerSingleton.TopicManager directory.
TopicManagerSingleton() - Constructor for class graph.TopicManagerSingleton
 
TopicManagerSingleton.TopicManager - Class in graph
The registry and factory directory that manages, queries, and clears all active Topic channels in the system.

U

unsubscribe(Agent) - Method in class graph.Topic
Unregisters an agent from the subscriber list.

V

views - package views
Contains graph visualization structures and HTML layout generators.
